output.summary: Int5-quantized 11-layer model with EMA/XSA uses chunked causal TTT that evaluates each validation chunk before training to keep scores one-pass.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Per-chunk causal test-time training adapts the model using only validation data after each chunk is scored.
techniques: Int5 quantization for all weight categories
Chunked causal test-time training with evaluate-then-train policy
EMA plus exclusive self-attention on final layers
